message:
fix(bundle): add locking for concurrent operations and improve parsing

Concurrency Safety (cli/commands/bundle.rs):
- Acquire GlobalLock before bundle install operations to prevent
  concurrent modifications to the skill database and bundle registry
- Acquire GlobalLock before bundle remove operations for same reason
- Lock is released automatically when operation completes (RAII)
- Prevents race conditions when multiple ms processes attempt to
  install or remove bundles simultaneously

Registry Parsing Test (bundler/registry.rs):
- Add test for ambiguous local path parsing behavior
- Paths like "skills/bundle.msb" that look like "owner/repo" are
  parsed as GitHub sources rather than local files
- This documents the intentional precedence: if a path matches the
  GitHub pattern (word/word), it's treated as a repo reference
- Users must use explicit prefixes (file:, ./) for local paths that
  look like GitHub references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
